```json
{
  "text": "I love sunny days",
  "sentiment": "positive",
  "confidence": 0.998,
  "keywords": ["love", "sunny"]
}
```

```json
{
  "text": "I hate rainy days",
  "sentiment": "negative",
  "confidence": 0.999,
  "keywords": ["hate", "rainy"]
}
```

```json
{
  "text": "The weather is fine",
  "sentiment": "neutral",
  "confidence": 0.999,
  "keywords": ["weather", "fine"]
}
```
